MAPDL_SYNTAX_UNKNOWN_COMMAND.description: APDL 명령어가 잘못되었거나 문법 오류가 발생한 경우

MAPDL_CONVERGENCE_FAILED.regex: convergence|not converged|solution not converged|failed to converge

MAPDL_LICENSE_CHECKOUT_FAILED.regex: ansys license manager error|license checkout fail|cannot check\s*out license|cannot connect to license|license server down|licensed number of users already reached|flexnet licensing error|flexlm.*(?:error|unavailable)
MAPDL_LICENSE_CHECKOUT_FAILED.description: 라이선스 체크아웃 또는 라이선스 서버 오류

MAPDL_MEMORY_ALLOCATION_FAILED.regex: insufficient memory|out of memory|memory allocation|not enough memory
MAPDL_MEMORY_ALLOCATION_FAILED.description: MAPDL 메모리 부족 또는 할당 실패

MAPDL_IO_FILE_ACCESS_FAILED.regex: cannot open|file not found|i/o error|permission denied|unable to open
